_purpose: Candidate P2 baseline matrix manifest for QM5_1003. Pipeline-Op consumes this Tuesday post-Codex-restore. Validates against framework/scripts/pipeline_dispatcher.py validate_matrix_payload() schema.
_authority: DL-038 (36-symbol matrix per phase) + DL-054 (5-gate enforcement) + DL-057 (single-run discipline)
_status: DRAFT — CTO + Pipeline-Op validate Tuesday before dispatch

window._note: Per PIPELINE_PHASE_SPEC.md § P2 — DEV 2017-2022 + HOLDOUT 2023-2024. CTO confirms exact window splits Tuesday.

tester._note: From framework/registry/tester_defaults.json (DL-054 Gate 2). Pipeline-Op MUST load these.
tester._tick_model_note: 4 = every tick, real ticks (production grade per skills/quaa138/mt5-backtesting/SKILL.md)

_symbols_source: framework/scripts/dl054_gates.py canonical_symbols_from_filesystem() output 2026-05-01 — matches DL-038 Rule 2 36-symbol matrix exactly

_symbols_excluded.JPN225.DWX: single 2026 stub hcc only — broker tick history starts 2026-02-02; insufficient for P2 DEV window
_symbols_excluded.XBRUSD.DWX: single 2026 stub hcc only — broker tick history starts 2026-02-02; insufficient for P2 DEV window
_symbols_excluded.GDAXI.DWX: non-canonical name; canonical is GDAXIm.DWX (broker `m` suffix)
_symbols_excluded.NDX.DWX: non-canonical name; canonical is NDXm.DWX (broker `m` suffix)

output._invalidation_notice_template: D:/QM/reports/pipeline/QM5_1003/P2/INVALIDATION_NOTICE.md (the previous broken matrix's notice; new run goes to P2_clean_<TIMESTAMP>, not P2)

gate_enforcement._invariant: Every report.csv row MUST have verdict in {PASS, INVALID, FAIL, ZERO_TRADE}. Bare PASS without all 5 gates = DL-054 violation, QT enforcer authority to reject.

tuesday_dispatch_steps: 1. Verify framework/registry/tester_defaults.json exists and matches expected (initial_deposit=100000, fixed_risk.amount=1000)
2. Run python framework/scripts/dl054_gates.py — expect 36 canonical symbols + tester_defaults loaded clean
3. For each symbol: python framework/scripts/dl054_gate_runner.py prelaunch ... — collect prelaunch verdicts
4. For symbols with verdict=PRELAUNCH_OK: dispatch tester per pipeline_dispatcher.py (T1-T5 load-balanced per DL-035)
5. For symbols with verdict=INVALID: write INVALID row to report.csv, do NOT launch tester
6. After tester completes: python framework/scripts/dl054_gate_runner.py postlaunch ... — collect post verdicts
7. python framework/scripts/dl054_gate_runner.py writerow ... — append final verdict to report.csv
8. QT reviews matrix per DL-054 gate-of-record
9. CEO consumes verdict; on phase_verdict=PASS advance to P3 (sweep); on FAIL diagnose
_cross_references: docs/ops/QUA-662_PHANTOM_PASS_AUDIT_2026-05-01.md — failure mode this manifest exists to prevent
